caption: A man wearing a brown collared shirt and a light-colored patterned shawl speaks into an ANI-branded microphone, surrounded by other people and outdoor foliage. Various on-screen graphics and text banners appear and change across the sequence. The top banner reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'", while the bottom red banner states "नड्डा: लोक सभा में हम बिहार में सभी सीटें जीतेंगे". On the right side of the screen, a vertical list of names and photos is displayed under the heading "मंत्री", featuring "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार" and "विजय चौधरी". In some frames, the left side includes a photo and title for "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", and others show "डिप्टी CM" with "सश्राट चौधरी" and "विजय सिन्हा". One banner changes to read "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". The right-side list also updates to include "विजेन्द्र यादव" and "श्रवण कुमार". A timestamp of "10:06 PM" remains constant at the bottom right.
